creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
Got a 4th one yesterday; only "interesting" thing about that one was that I wasn't at work -- I was on a bus, so I don't think I was using the "enterprise authentication" stuff.  But I had forgotten to run "wlandebug +crypto".

Then I got a 5th one a bit earlier today, running FreeBSD localhost 10.2-STABLE FreeBSD 10.2-STABLE #131  r287231M/287249:1002500: Fri Aug 28 04:32:20 PDT 2015     root@g1-252.catwhisker.org:/common/S1/obj/usr/src/sys/CANARY  amd64

And I had run "wlandebug +crypto" beforehand; I'm uploading {vmcore,core.txt}.3{,.gz} to the directory on my Web server.  I also copied /var/log/messages up there.
